doc.title: HTML Document
doc.content:
Welcome

This is a sample HTML document with CDATA.

doc.title: JavaScript Code
CSS Stylesheet
SQL Query
doc.content: -- Complex SQL query with joins and aggregations SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, COUNT(o.id) as order_count, SUM(o.total) as total_spent, AVG(o.total) as avg_order_value FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE u.created_at >= '2023-01-01' AND u.status = 'active' GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 5 ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 100;

doc.title: JSON Data
Python Script
Bash Script
doc.content:
#!/bin/bash # Deployment script
set -e
echo "Starting deployment..."
# Build the application npm run build
# Run tests npm test
# Stop old container docker-compose down
# Build and start new container docker-compose up -d --build
# Check health sleep 5 curl -f http://localhost:3000/health || exit 1
echo "Deployment complete!"

doc.title: SVG Image
doc.content: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="#667eea"/> <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="30" fill="#764ba2"/> <text x="50" y="55" text-anchor="middle" fill="white" font-size="20">SVG</text> </svg>
